chemotherapy_drugs.special_instructions: Infuse at a rate of 1mg/min of cisplatin (minimum 60 minutes). Dose banded according to CSCCN agreed bands. Radiotherapy should be administered within 60 minutes of the end of cisplatin infusion. Post-hydration may be interrupted briefly to facilitate radiotherapy. Cisplatin is an exfoliant - extravasation precautions required. No more than 9 cycles should be given if cisplatin started in advance of radiotherapy.

special_warnings: Palliative intent protocol for recurrent/advanced uterine cancer
Docetaxel premedication with dexamethasone 8mg twice daily for 3 days (starting 24 hours before docetaxel) is mandatory to prevent fluid retention and hypersensitivity reactions
If patient forgets dexamethasone premedication, give dexamethasone 20mg IV bolus 15-30 minutes before chemotherapy
Docetaxel hypersensitivity: minor symptoms (flushing, rash) - do not interrupt infusion; severe reactions (hypotension, bronchospasm, erythema) - discontinue immediately
Docetaxel doses > 200mg must be diluted in 500ml sodium chloride 0.9%
Fluid retention from docetaxel (weight gain) is not a reason to alter doses
Cisplatin and docetaxel are both exfoliants - extravasation precautions required
Cisplatin is highly emetogenic - aprepitant-based antiemesis required
If a third dose reduction is required, treatment should be stopped

drugs.notes: Once daily days 1-14 (cycles 1 and 2); once daily days 1-21 (cycles 3-8) | Flat dose 50mg oral. Cycles 1-2: days 1-14 inclusive. Cycles 3-8: days 1-21 inclusive. Take one hour before food or on empty stomach. NPSA oral cytotoxic alert applies.

indication: Relapsed/refractory ovarian cancer in patients unsuitable for other treatments; Palliative; Performance status 0, 1, 2

chemotherapy_drugs.special_instructions: Flat dose 50mg oral. Swallow whole with plenty of water, do not chew. NPSA oral cytotoxic alert applies.

take_home_medicines.frequency: Once daily for 28 days
take_home_medicines.instructions: Swallow whole with plenty of water, do not chew. NPSA oral cytotoxic alert applies.

take_home_medicines.frequency: Three times a day as required
take_home_medicines.instructions: As required for nausea

dose_modifications.notes: Withhold until recovery to >=1x10^9/L. If recovered within 7 days resume at full dose. If not recovered at 7 days, delay until recovery then continue with 50mg on alternate days or discontinue as appropriate

Withhold until recovery to >=75x10^9/L. If recovered within 7 days resume at full dose. If not recovered at 7 days, delay until recovery then continue with 50mg on alternate days or discontinue as appropriate
Clinical decision. Evidence that exposure to active metabolites may not be increased, suggesting dose reduction may not be necessary

dose_modifications.condition: NCI-CTC grade 3 or above non-haematological toxicity
dose_modifications.notes: Delay until resolved to NCI-CTC grade 1 or below. Consider giving 50mg on alternate days or discontinue as appropriate

treatment_delay_criteria.notes: FBC, LFTs and U&Es prior to day 1 of treatment. Note: platelet threshold for this protocol is 75 x10^9/L (not the standard 100). Consider blood transfusion if symptomatic anaemia or Hb < 8g/dL.

monitoring_requirements: FBC prior to day 1 of each cycle
LFTs prior to day 1 of each cycle
U&Es prior to day 1 of each cycle
special_warnings: NPSA oral cytotoxic alert (NPSA/2008/RRR001) must be followed in relation to oral cyclophosphamide
Palliative protocol for relapsed/refractory ovarian cancer in patients unsuitable for other treatments
Cyclophosphamide must be swallowed whole with plenty of water - do not chew
Haemorrhagic cystitis is a rare but serious adverse effect - ensure adequate hydration
Platelet treatment delay threshold for this protocol is 75 x10^9/L (lower than standard 100 x10^9/L)
If not recovered within 7 days consider 50mg on alternate days as dose reduction option
If a third dose reduction is required, treatment should be stopped
Metronomic low-dose oral schedule - continuous dosing throughout the 28-day cycle

required_patient_fields.creatinine_clearance_ml_min: Required for renal dose modification decisions
required_patient_fields.performance_status: Must be 0, 1 or 2; unsuitable for other treatments

drugs.special_instructions: Flat dose 50mg oral. Swallow whole with plenty of water, do not chew. NPSA oral cytotoxic alert applies.
drugs.notes: Once daily days 1-28 inclusive (continuous) | Flat dose 50mg oral. Swallow whole with plenty of water, do not chew. NPSA oral cytotoxic alert applies.
